summary: Comprehensive testing of KOLO CRM app completed successfully - all critical features working correctly including landing page, login, subscribe flow, API endpoints, and Stripe integration
passed_tests: Root API endpoint returns correct 'KOLO API v1.0.0' message
Geo pricing API returns correct regional pricing (USD, EUR, GBP)
Country-specific pricing works for US, GB, FR, DE
Landing page renders with logo, headline, feature cards, pricing
Navigation between landing, login, and subscribe pages works
Login page has all required elements (back button, Google login, email/password)
Subscribe page shows pricing and payment method card
Payment integration redirects to Stripe correctly
Form inputs accept text and have proper types
Back button navigation working across all pages
Mobile-first PWA design responsive and professional
Locale detection and currency formatting working
